title: Born In Configuration
description: An Unofficial Configuration for Born In Chaos
body: Born In Configuration is a addon mod for the mod [Born In Chaos](https://modrinth.com/mod/borninchaos) that adds all configuration from the mod in gamerule into a fully fletched config file for ease of configuration of the mod,while also adding a couple of new configs for the mod. [](https://discord.gg/S9kUFsmw2f)
